case_title: PORTOLA PLACE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION VS. ROSARIO GERMINO

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $156.66 FILED BY PORTOLA PLACE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT GERMINO, ROSARIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-03-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
